summary: Fourth-generation apex locators enhance apical location by using multiple frequency ratios for improved accuracy over traditional methods that rely solely on electrical resistance measures. This new approach aims at reducing errors associated with single-resistance-based systems while providing a safer alternative during root canal treatments. To directly address your query regarding specific features distinguishing these devices from previous ones, option D stands out due its focus on advancing beyond simple resistive techniques used previously. Agent2 reasoned about how modern apex locators have moved away from basic principles such as measuring just one type of resistance; instead they now utilize complex combinations including different frequencies which better suit contemporary dental practices aiming high levels of diagnostic reliability without compromising patient safety throughout procedures involving intricate anatomy within
